answers.description: A feature-rich personal productivity web app that stores tasks as Obsidian-compatible markdown files, synced across all devices via Obsidian Headless Sync.
answers.problem_statement: Existing todo apps lock your data in proprietary formats, don't integrate with knowledge management tools like Obsidian, and lack the flexibility to build a truly personalized productivity workflow.
answers.target_users: Obsidian power users who want a dedicated task management UI
answers.key_goals: 1) Data ownership via markdown files 2) Rich web UI rivaling Things 3 / Todoist 3) Seamless cross-device sync
answers.design_principles: Performance first, User delight and polish, Developer experience focused
